violations.text: Several cheeses located in the display case were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Reviewed date marking procedures with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
A ceiling tile in the back kitchen was observed to have stains from previous water damage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
